data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. IDEAL CROWN has had two runs this prep without filling a placing. Added to the sequence last time over 1700m at Ascot Park Raceway, finishing 19 metres away from the winner in sixth. Finds a nice race and can take this out. 5. RIGHTAZZ hasn't been too far off them of late and again performed well last time over 2000m at Oamaru, finishing fifth and just 8 metres from the winner. Good enough to take out a race like this. 3. HONEYCOMB is in the mix following a fourth at her most recent appearance over 2400m at this track. 8. RAKAMICK cannot be ruled out but needs a bit of luck from the tricky draw.","runners":[4,5,3,8],"exclusive":true}
